name: studio.list_blog_categories
description: Enumerate blog categories on an Actium Studio site. Returns id, name, slug, and post count for each category.
whenToUse: Resolve the category_id for a named category before assigning it to a post during create_post / update_post.
Operator asks 'what categories does this blog have' without naming one.
Taxonomy audit: enumerate to find empty categories or detect near-duplicates before dedup.
whenNotToUse: Caller already knows the category_id — skip listing and assign directly.
Caller is looking for tags (cross-cutting keywords) rather than categories (hierarchical buckets) — use studio.list_blog_tags.
Caller wants posts in a category — list posts filtered by category_id via studio.list_posts, not this skill.
